title: Salvage Workbench (Seamless Item reclamation)
description: Lets users salvage rescources from items that they dont need anymore. Also includes enchanted items
body:

***

# About

The Salvage workbench turns crafted items back into materials with a clean, immersive in-world workstation.

***

## Features

*   A new block: **Salvage Workbench**
*   Salvage items into rescources
*   Recover enchantments from items
*   Works with hoppers

***

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1493520/description_46e201e0-04a4-4507-8048-ce9088ed02f4.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1493520/description_83c59ae9-6479-4875-ad11-7ed5945e515c.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1493520/description_729701e4-06e1-44e2-b3bc-8ba333400fb9.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1493520/description_c74b0dca-973b-4075-ba8e-11bebd7ef52c.png)

### Durability-Based Returns

Damageable items now return fewer materials based on condition:

*   **Durability < 25%**: minimum return of **1 item total**
*   **Durability < 50%**: returns about **50%** of normal output
*   **Durability < 75%**: returns about **70%** of normal output
*   **Durability >= 75%**: full output rules apply

For non-damageable items (like most blocks), full output is used.

## Requirements

*   **Minecraft 1.21.11**
*   **Fabric Loader 0.18+**
*   **Java 21+**
*   **Seamless API**

## Notes

This mod focuses on survival-friendly salvage and recovery, not free duplication. Returns are intentionally balanced by durability and configurable loss settings. For Bug reports please open an issue on github, or message me through discord!

## API Integration

This project is aligned with **Seamless-API** to make custom integrations easier for other modders.
